citations: SRS.md FR-19 lines 158–163 (L3 LLM sequence — ambiguity resolved by SAD)
summary: Four gaps fixed with surgical edits: (1) GAP 1 HIGH — §3.9 L3 LLM constraint block rewritten as a numbered 7-step sequence with GroundingChecker.check() correctly placed at step 5 (after LLM call at step 4), and §4.1 sequence diagram L3 branch updated to match the same corrected order, both citing SRS.md FR-19 lines 158–163 ambiguity; (2) GAP 2 MEDIUM — §3.7 extended with a new EmotionClassifier sub-module spec (source path classifier.py, public API classify(text)->EmotionScore, Option A rule-based selected for Phase 2 latency budget, ADR-pending noted), with corresponding updates to §2.2 row 8, §6 SAB emotion layer, §7 FR-17 row, and §9.3 new modules table; (3) GAP 3 LOW — §3.8 now explicitly defines a DialogueStateTracker orchestrator class (source tracker.py, constructor db+intent_classifier, methods get_state/process_message/_apply_transition_rules) alongside the existing DialogueState immutable data class, with a naming note clarifying the distinction; (4) GAP 4 LOW — §3.11 EscalationManagerV2 constraints augmented with an 'Architectural Decision (ADR-pending)' callout explaining that the priority-to-reason mapping is justified by SLA_BY_PRIORITY values and user-impact severity ordering, not constrained by FR-20, and is to be formally recorded in ADR.md Phase 2.
